ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED( Proposed_Contact_Owner__c ), NOT(ISBLANK(Proposed_Contact_Owner__c)), NOT(BypassProposedOwnerVR__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update the Proposed Contact Owner. Please use the Change Owner button at the top right of the page.
